title: LEGO 21323 Ideas Grand Piano Model Building Set for Adults, Collectible Home Décor Kit, Gift for Music Lovers, Men, Women, Him & Her with Motor and Power Functions
features: Large LEGO set for adults features the first-ever, 'playable' Grand Piano model with 14 songs accessible via the LEGO Powered Up app
This is the first Ideas set equipped with Powered Up components: a hub, a motor and a WeDo 2.0 Motion Sensor, a perfect creative DIY project
The piano has an opening fallboard, 25 separate moving keys each with its own real hammer action, moving pedal and dampers, and more
The piano's lid can be folded/raised and propped up, with an adjustable music stand wide enough for a smartphone, to see the songs playing
It has an opening battery access panel, removable keyboard to admire authentic functional details and a piano stool with adjustable height
All 3 legs are equipped with roller caster wheels, which makes moving the gorgeous display model easy - a beautiful centrepiece in any home

This model kit for adults to build makes a fab treat for music lovers as a birthday present, housewarming gift or anniversary present for wife or husband, and makes a fabulous home or office décor centerpiece (Amazon Exclusive)
description: From the manufacturer An Amazon Exclusive LEGO Grand Piano A fully articulated, LEGO brick version of a grand piano exclusively sold on Amazon and selected retailers. Reveal the authentic details Recreate the hammer action of 25 piano keys in LEGO style and watch a masterpiece in motion. Designed to perform First, connect to the free LEGO Powered Up app to play a tune on this motorized piano. Auto or Self-Play with your Smartphone Then, listen as the piano plays a song of your choice or pretend to play along with a pre-recorded song you select. Orchestrated movement Operate the adjustable bench and moving pedals. A true showpiece This 3,662-piece set with exquisite details includes clear instructions for a smooth building experience.
